title: throwable-weapons
description: Throwable Weapons is a Minecraft mod that let you throw any enchanted weapon with the yeet enchant for devastating ranged attacks!
body:
# 🗡️ Throwable Weapons
## ✨ Features
Throw your weapons - Press G (configurable) to launch your weapon at enemies
2X Damage - Thrown weapons deal double the base damage
YEET Enchantment (I-V) - Required to throw weapons. Higher levels increase:
Throwing speed & distance
Bonus damage (up to +50%)
Knockback power (up to +2.5)
Special visual effects at higher levels
LOYALTY Enchantment (I-III) - Makes weapons return automatically after hitting
Level I: Slow return
Level II: Medium return
Level III: Fast return
Realistic Mechanics - Without Loyalty, weapons stick into:
Mobs - Stays embedded until the mob dies or you retrieve it
Blocks - Stays planted in the ground for manual pickup
## 🎮 How to Use
Enchant any sword or axe with Yeet (required)
Optionally add Loyalty for auto-return
Hold the weapon and press G to throw
Watch it fly and deal massive damage!
